problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
